journal_entry.reason: Target paid $1,000,000 cash as a prepayment for raw materials. This creates a Prepaid Inventory asset (debit) and reduces Cash (credit). The prepayment will be converted to inventory when the raw materials are received.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Target paid $1,000,000 cash as a prepayment for raw materials. This is a straightforward prepayment transaction. The company is exchanging one asset (cash) for another asset (prepaid inventory/prepaid expense). The prepayment creates a Prepaid Inventory or Prepaid Expense asset account that will be converted to inventory when the raw materials are received. Debit: Prepaid Inventory (asset increase) $1,000,000. Credit: Cash (asset decrease) $1,000,000. Total debits = total credits = $1,000,000.
